_comment: Hand-maintained scenario-exclusive tags (P5; provenance §3.1: encode the scenario map as a small hand-maintained data file). GameTora's sce_e does not tag the 21xxxx scenario-skill block at all, so the generator cannot derive these. scenarioId values are game-internal single_mode_scenario.id (1=URA, 2=Aoharu/Unity Cup, 4=Make a New Track/Trackblazer — id 3 does not exist). Skill-id ranges anchored by uma-skill-tools tools/make_skill_data.pl lines 20-37 (retrieved 2026-06-12). Extend by hand when a new scenario reaches Global (e.g. Grand Live's 210071/210072 → scenarioId 5).

210011._comment: Burning Spirit SPD — Aoharu Hai (Unity Cup) scenario skill.

210061._comment: Radiant Star — Make a New Track (Trackblazer) scenario skill.

210062._comment: Glittering Star — Make a New Track (Trackblazer).
